mapper.select: select id, organization_id, name, parent_id, wecom_dept_id, sort_order, dept_status, sync_status, sync_time, leader_wecom_userid, create_time, update_time, create_user, update_user from department where organization_id = #{organizationId} order by sort_order asc, create_time asc
select count(*) from department where organization_id = #{organizationId} and dept_status = 1

select u.department_id as departmentId, count(distinct u.id) as userCount from user u inner join user_role_relation urr on u.id = urr.user_id and urr.source_id = #{organizationId} where u.deleted = 0 and u.department_id is not null group by u.department_id
